textAnnotations.description:
Produced and Bottled by
Hawk's Shadow Estate
Dripping Springs, Texas
www.hawksshadow.com
Special Thanks to Tim Drake
w's Shadow focuses on hand-crafted wines, working hard fr
tion like our daddy taught us. Our passion is finding nature's
Texas grapes and unlocking the great wine that is their desti
2011 Orange Muscat
Lost Draw Vineyards
Texas High Plains
~Fermented bone dry~
single vineyard wine, made from Lost Draw Vineyards grapes
as of green apple and lemon grass, finishing with crisp lingering
es of orange blossom. This wine craves great Texas food such as
nhill country cheese, fresh berries over an a
arugula salad, gre
seafood, and surprisingly, carrot cake. We hope you enjoy its
uch as we do.
GOVERNMENT WARNING:
ACCORDING TO THE SURGEON GENERAL, WOMEN
OULD NOT DRINK ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES DURING
PEDANCY BECAUSE OF THE RISK OF BIRTH DEFECTS.
CONSUMPTION OF ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES IMPAIRS
ABILITY TO DRIVE A CAR OR OPERATE MACHINERY
MAY CAUSE HEALTH PROBLEMS.
TAINS SULFITES
13.68% Alcohol/Volume
375 AL
